scenario.context: Station 07 of the day flow: Deliver the presentation, answer questions and ensure quality.
scenario.mission: You assess the presentation delivery and secure content and communication quality.

constraints: answer questions in a structured way

customerRequest.subject: Station 07: Deliver and review the presentation
customerRequest.body: Please deliver the prepared presentation, answer questions confidently and secure quality through clear criteria.

questions.title: Quality criteria during the presentation
questions.prompt: Which criteria help with good presentation delivery? (Multiple selection)

options.text: Present key messages clearly and in a structured way
Ignore questions due to time pressure

feedback.correct: Correct: these are central quality criteria.
feedback.wrong: Partially wrong: please consider structure, audience focus and questions more strongly.

questions.title: Answer questions professionally
questions.prompt: Order the sequence for a professional answer to questions.
items: Transition cleanly to the next topic
correctOrder: Transition cleanly to the next topic

feedback.correct: Correct: answer quality and flow are well secured.
feedback.wrong: Not optimal: please keep a structured response flow.

questions.title: Transition under time pressure
questions.prompt: Time is running out. What is the best step?

options.text: Skip the rest spontaneously without notice
Prioritize key points and communicate transparently what will be delivered later

feedback.correct: Correct: prioritization and transparency are decisive here.
feedback.wrong: Not appropriate: time pressure requires structured prioritization.

questions.title: Assess question time
questions.prompt: The Q&A was planned for 8 minutes, but actually lasted 11 minutes. By how many minutes was the plan exceeded?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate the difference between actual and plan correctly.

questions.title: Short delivery feedback
questions.prompt: Provide a short delivery feedback (4-6 sentences) with strength, weakness and a concrete improvement.
questions.expectedOutline: Balanced assessment with directly actionable improvement.

feedback.correct: Correct: the feedback is differentiated and useful.
feedback.wrong: Please separate strength, weakness and improvement more clearly.
